heading: Reports to Congress on operation of agreement
label: 2573 Reports to Congress on operation of agreement
text: As soon as practicable after the close of the 3-year period beginning on the date on which this subchapter takes effect, and as soon as practicable after the close of each succeeding 3-year period through 2001, the Trade Representative shall prepare and submit to Congress a report containing an evaluation of the operation of the Agreement, both domestically and internationally, during the period.
notes: Amendments1996— amended directory language of . See 1993 Amendment note below.Pub. L. 104–295Pub. L. 103–1821994— inserted “through 2001” after “succeeding 3-year period”.Pub. L. 103–4651993—, as amended by , substituted “Trade Representative” for “Special Representative”.Pub. L. 103–182Pub. L. 104–295

Effective Date of 1994 AmendmentAmendment by effective on the date on which the WTO Agreement enters into force with respect to the United States (), see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 103–465section 352 of Pub. L. 103–465section 2531 of this titleJan. 1, 1995
